query:
SELECT 
  DATE(ae.event_time) as work_date,
  w.manual_code,
  w.full_name,
  ae.event_type,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM attendance_events ae
JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
GROUP BY DATE(ae.event_time), w.id, ae.event_type
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
